storeInfoHeader e boloka tshedimosetso e e neetsweng mo go sengwe se se leng teng sa header ya karabo ya HTTP ka fa tlase ga mofuta o o tlhalositsweng. Tiro eno e akanya ka mefuta e e latelang ya tshedimosetso: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Di bolokiwa jaaka dikonopo tsa 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', le 'Cache-Control', ka go latelana. Tshedimosetso e balwa go tswa mo dikopelong tsa modirisi. Fa mofuta wa tshedimosetso o o tlhalositsweng o siame, header ya karabo e e tlhabolotsweng e tshwanetse go nna le yone. Fa go direga sengwe se se phoso, tiro e tshwanetse go busetsa mmapa wa header wa ntlhantlha ntle le diphetogo dipe. @param {string} infoType Mofuta wa tshedimosetso e e tshwanetseng go bolokiwa mo header. @param {string} info Content Tshedimosetso ya tshedimosetso e e tshwanetseng go bolokiwa mo header. @param {ob} header The reply header. @object The header updated information stored with the map.
